    Microsoft Clarity
    Microsoft Clarity

Discover Copilot in Bing Webmaster Tools, a whole new way to work

Explore new ways to work smarter and faster using the power of AI. Copilot in Bing Webmaster can help you get actionable insights about your website data, provides real time support, and more.


Your data and reports are being processed and it may take upto 48 hours to reflect. Meanwhile, to speed up the indexing process, please submit your sitemap by using the Sitemaps feature.

Get started with



URL Submission
URL Submission



Webmasters can submit URLs to Bing for immediate crawl and indexation as soon as the URLs are published or updated online.



Sitemaps
Sitemaps



Sitemaps are an excellent way to tell Bing about URLs on your site that would be otherwise hard to discover by our web crawler



URL Inspection
URL Inspection



URL Inspection is a tool to inspect any url from your domain to quickly check index status, seo issues and markups.



Site Scan
Site Scan



Site Scan is an on-demand site audit tool which crawls your site and checks for common technical SEO issues. With this tool, you can improve your website performance not only on Bing but on other search engines as well.



Keyword Research
Keyword Research



The keyword research tool is designed to specifically assist webmasters and content creators to see which phrases searchers enter queries for, and in what volumes. The tool uses organic data to understand the relative popularity of terms.



Block URLs
Block URLs



The Block URLs feature allows you to temporarily block page and directory URLs as well as cached pages from showing up in the Bing Search result.

Are you a news site? Reach millions with Bing PubHub

Expand your site traffic by distributing contents to Bing, Edge, Windows, Office & Dynamics. Start the submission now.

Use your Bing indexed pages to dynamically create search ads
Use your Bing indexed pages to dynamically create search ads

Dynamic search ads provide a streamlined, low-touch way to make sure customers searching on the Microsoft Advertising Network find your products or services

Robots.txt
Robots.txt

Robots.txt Tester helps Webmasters to analyze their robots.txt file and highlight the issues that would prevent them from getting optimally crawled by Bing and other robots
Bing Webmaster Tools
Get started

Microsoft Open-Sources Industry-Leading Embedding Model
Microsoft Open-Sources Industry-Leading Embedding Model

Harrier is a new embedding model series designed for the demands of modern AI systems. It is our latest open-source text embedding model series, delivering state-of-the-art performance and ranking 1st on the multilingual MTEB-v2 benchmark. This result reflects Microsoft’s sustained commitment to improve grounding quality through advances in embedding models.

Learn more

Similar Sites
Similar Sites

Analyze your websites' backlink profile with up to two other sites backlinks. Also get data on number of referring domains and anchors to each of the selected site.
Bing Webmaster Tools
Get started

Introducing AI Performance in Bing Webmaster Tools Public Preview
Introducing AI Performance in Bing Webmaster Tools Public Preview

Now in public preview, AI Performance in Bing Webmaster Tools shows when your site is cited in AI‑generated answers across Microsoft Copilot, AI‑generated summaries in Bing, and select partner integrations. See which URLs are referenced and how citation activity changes over time.

Learn more

Monetize your site with Microsoft
Monetize your site with Microsoft

Microsoft is piloting a new website monetization product, offering a simple way for publishers of any size to earn more from their site. Serve beautiful ads that match the look and feel of your website.
Bing Team
Learn more

Does Duplicate Content Hurt SEO and AI Search Visibility?
Does Duplicate Content Hurt SEO and AI Search Visibility?

Duplicate content quietly drains your search visibility. When multiple versions of a page blur signals and dilute authority, search engines may surface outdated or unintended URLs. Learn how duplicates form, why they hurt SEO and AI search results, and how canonical tags and IndexNow help restore clarity and control.

Learn more

Evolving role of the index: From ranking pages to supporting answers
Evolving role of the index: From ranking pages to supporting answers

Search indexing was built to help humans decide what to read. Grounding is being built to help AI systems decide what to say and simultaneously helping people to verify, refine, or challenge what the AI system produces. That is the shift - and it runs deeper than it might first appear.

Learn more

Microsoft Clarity is Now Available!
Microsoft Clarity is Now Available!

Find out how your users interact with your website. Access click & scroll heatmaps, session replays, and insights. It's easy to get started.
